name: X-Golf Woodbury
about: X-Golf Woodbury is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring 6 state-of-the-art simulators. The facility offers a blend of golf simulation, training, and social entertainment with a full bar and food options. Pricing varies by time and day, with hourly rates starting at $40 for off-peak hours and discounts available for seniors, veterans, and PCC members. It is best suited for casual golfers, families, and groups looking for a tech-driven golf experience combined with a relaxed social atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology with high accuracy
Full bar and food service available

food_and_drink.notes: Food and beverage packages available, including pizzas and other menu items.
Full liquor service and craft beer available.

simulator_hardware: X-Golf Simulator (Camera systems, Infrared lasers, Impact sensors)

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed; the venue offers a full bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about 1 hour per person to play 18 holes; additional players may require more time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and the venue offers family-oriented activities and events.
